title: Aracaju, SE — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Aracaju, SE: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Aracaju is a city in SE with a population of 672,614. Sergipe’s planned coastal capital, known for its orderly layout, riverfront Orla de Atalaia, and proximity to São Francisco River canyons.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
